title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules derived from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei's approach to deciding what to build with Claude. The framework is presented as guidance for individuals and businesses to avoid building the wrong products.
